description: Kafka exporter instance drill-down: exporter identity and runtime, cluster metadata, topic/partition topology, consumer lag, node resources, and service logs.

panels.description: Selected kafka_exporter identity and reachability. Click to return to its logical cluster.
Exporter target, build, and runtime identity.
panels.title: Exporter Identity

panels.description: Exporter process uptime, memory, concurrency, and file descriptor pressure.
panels.title: Exporter Runtime

panels.description: Sum of log-end minus oldest offsets. This is an offset span, not an exact record count for compacted topics.
panels.title: Offset Span

panels.description: Cluster metadata observed through this exporter: log-end growth and committed-offset progress.
panels.title: Append / Commit Progress

panels.description: Log-end minus oldest offset per topic; useful for retention balance but not an exact record count on compacted topics.
panels.title: Offset Span by Topic

panels.description: Partition leader count by broker ID as observed by this exporter.
panels.title: Leader Distribution

panels.description: Broker IDs and advertised listener addresses.
panels.title: Broker Directory

panels.description: Complete topic catalog from this exporter.
panels.title: Topic Inventory

panels.description: Consumer membership, committed offsets, progress, and lag. Empty when no consumer groups exist.
panels.title: Consumer Group Inventory

panels.description: Selected topic topology, replication health, and retained offset span.
panels.title: Topic Health

panels.description: Leader, preferred-leader state, replicas, ISR, offsets, retention span, and worst consumer lag per partition.
panels.title: Partition Topology

panels.description: Exact committed offset and lag for every selected consumer group and partition of the selected topic. Empty when no matching consumer groups exist.
panels.title: Consumer Partition Offsets

panels.description: Kafka service log events grouped by severity on the selected node.

targets.expr: ip:$ip job:syslog (unit:kafka OR app:kafka) | stats by (level) count() as count

panels.title: Kafka Log Volume

panels.description: kafka_exporter log events grouped by severity on the selected node.

targets.expr: ip:$ip job:syslog (unit:kafka_exporter OR app:kafka_exporter) | stats by (level) count() as count

panels.title: Exporter Log Volume

targets.expr: ip:$ip job:syslog (unit:kafka OR app:kafka) | fields level,unit,_msg
ip:$ip job:syslog (unit:kafka_exporter OR app:kafka_exporter) | fields level,unit,_msg

title: Kafka Instance
